creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
If there's a DTrace script running when I suspend my laptop, an assertion failure is triggered upon resume:

Assertion failed: (timestamp >= dtp->dt_last_timestamp), file /usr/home/markj/src/freebsd/cddl/lib/libdtrace/../../../cddl/contrib/opensolaris/lib/libdtrace/common/dt_consume.c, line 3342.
